headline: RFK Jr. Says If You See Cash Homebuyers, 'Pull the Strings And Follow the Breadcrumbs'…It Leads to Wall Street. Is His 2030 Warning Tracking?
summary: The housing market has produced plenty of villains in recent years — high rates, low supply, stubborn prices. But back in 2023, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. pointed his finger somewhere else. "The real reason that housing has outpaced anything else...

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider BlackRock (BLK) After Its Recent Strong Multi‑Year Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether BlackRock's current share price still makes sense for new money, or if the easy gains are already behind it, you are asking the right question before focusing on valuation. The stock last closed at US$1,063.23, with returns of 11.0% over 1 year, 64.4% over 3 years and 69.7% over 5 years, while the shorter term picture shows a 2.8% decline over 7 days, 5.0% decline over 30 days and 2.0% decline year to date. Recent news flow around BlackRock has focused on its...
